General.Name: Esprit Holdings
General.Description: Esprit Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in licensing business. It is also involved in the provision of financial, sourcing, and other services; and wholesale, retail, sourcing, and e-commerce distribution of apparel and accessories, as well as holding of trademarks. Esprit Holdings Limited was founded in 1968 and is headquartered in North Point, Hong Kong.
General.Address: China United Centre, North Point, Hong Kong
